song.title: Promises
song.lyrics: [B1] Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me [V1] I surrendered my life to Your ways I have learned what it means to obey Jesus, my heart has been changed by You [V2] I am walking the path You have made I am seeking the truth every day Jesus, my heart has been changed by You [P] I couldn’t walk away if I tried 'Cause Your love is better than life [C] Now the sun’s shining bright And it just wont set 'Cause Your love is alive And it lights my step My heart is amazed Every day to the next Your joy overtakes And I can’t forget about it [B2] Woah-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh I can’t forget about it [T] You make all things Work together for my good [Z] Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me Singin' all Your promises wont let go of me I surrendered my life to Your ways I have learned what it means to obey Jesus, my heart has been changed by You I am walking the path You have made I am seeking the truth every day Jesus, my heart has been changed by You I couldn’t walk away if I tried 'Cause your love is better than life Now the sun’s shining bright And it just wont set 'Cause Your love is a light And it lights my step My heart is amazed Every day to the next Your joy overtakes And I can’t forget about it Woah-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh Woah-oh-oh I can’t forget about it
